description: Triggers error-critic.js by giving Claude a failing Bash script. Verifies diagnose-then-fix workflow + loop-detection forcing instruction NOT firing (proxy for Claude behaving well after the first failure).

expected_soft_signals.specialist_agents_spawned: no expected (small task; root may handle)
expected_soft_signals.route_decide_consulted: fires only if agent spawn (unlikely for this task size)

notes: Small task. If Claude retries the failing command 3+ times without diagnosing, error-critic emits a forcing instruction → no_repeat_failure_forcing_instruction FAILS.
